exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group presentation(cloud)[Presentation]
    group application(server)[Application]
    group data(disk)[Data]
    group analytics(chart)[Analytics]
    group orchestration(gear)[Orchestration]

    service frontend(logos:nginx)[Frontend] in presentation
    service azurefunc(logos:azure)[Azure Functions] in application
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes] in orchestration
    service s3(logos:aws-s3)[S3 Bucket] in data
    service bigquery(logos:google-cloud)[BigQuery] in analytics
    service cloudwatch(logos:aws-cloudwatch)[CloudWatch] in orchestration
    service docker(logos:docker)[Docker] in application

    frontend:R -- L:azurefunc
    azurefunc:R -- L:s3
    azurefunc:B -- T:k8s
    k8s:R -- L:docker
    docker:R -- L:bigquery
    bigquery:B -- T:cloudwatch
    s3:B -- T:cloudwatch
    k8s:B -- T:cloudwatch
    azurefunc:R -- L:bigquery
